notes: IFC-238 v2 — fixed after deliverable verification. Auth guard now gates on BOTH authLoading AND !isAuthenticated (was missing !isAuthenticated check). Tests strengthened: AC-001 test asserts form heading/inputs absent + skeleton shown for unauthenticated; success test uses fake timers and asserts router.push('/leads'); error test wraps in act(). TypeScript/Build pre-existing failures in opportunity.router.ts and zep-budget.router.ts are not IFC-238 related.
